drawer.aboutSubtitle: Drawer-only sample screen. Replace with product content.

home.title: Welcome
home.subtitle: Your app shell is ready. Replace this screen with your product UI.
home.graphqlDescription: Apollo query against the Rick and Morty API. Replace operations under src/services/graphql/operations/ with your schema.
home.restDescription: Axios GET against JSONPlaceholder. Replace fetchExampleTodo in src/services/rest/ with your endpoints.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose how the app looks on this device.
settings.toastsDescription: Sample success, error, and info toasts via @/utils/toast.
settings.permissionsDescription: Check status and request access for capabilities selected at bootstrap.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: A short intro shown once after install. Replace these screens with your product onboarding.
onboarding.featuresSubtitle: Finish to enter the app. This flow is gated with Stack.Protected until completed.

auth.signInSubtitle: Mock auth for the bootstrap shell. Wire your real provider into SessionProvider.
